texto: Only in sleep, where there's nothing but mind, can the mind clearly process all of the day's experiences/memories - without distraction. And, perhaps, only in sleep, where there's nothing but mind, can the mind truly understand the meaning of these memories, as well, and assimilate them with all the other memories you've accumulated over time, forming greater meanings - unintelligible in the light of day - building, perhaps, to some ultimate meaning at the culmination of life - unintelligible in the light of living.
explicacao: Citação de Mark X. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Only in sleep, where there's nothing but mind, can the mind clearly process all of the day's expe…” articula reflexao, distraction, dreaming em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dreaming e dreams.

texto: Of course, I'm not quite ready to forsake all the products of society, just yet. I have my clothes, my books, etc... But more and more I can see myself leaving much of the rest behind - leaving their makers, and the crucible from which they proceed. If at times, after all, I might benefit by the rays of the sun, must I seek also to reside in its nuclear core?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mark X. que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Of course, I'm not quite ready to forsake all the products of society, just yet. I have my clothe…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, antisocial, hermit, com foco em hermit e misanthropy.

texto: We are killing, every one of us, every moment of the day - just by living. And if one realizes this, is this very realization itself not a conscious consent to murder? If a truly circumspect Jain was truly serious about not killing anything, wouldn't his only recourse be to kill himself?

texto: To return to nature is to embrace extinction.
explicacao: Citação de Mark X. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “To return to nature is to embrace extinction.” articula reflexao, extinction, nature em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como nature e primitivism.
